creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 200270
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.6.0

Reporter is MAINTAINER, set maintainer-approval on attachment accordingly

@David If you could do the same for future issues with attachments for ports you maintain, that would be great (and save us time) :)

Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]

Or during attachment upload
